nl_query: Count the number of question papers created per source type this semester.
failed_sql: SELECT qp.source_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM question_paper qp JOIN exam_schedule_cache esc ON qp.exam_id = esc.id WHERE esc.academic_year = '2025-2026' AND esc.exam_date >= DATE_TRUNC('semester', CURRENT_DATE) AND esc.exam_date < DATE_TRUNC('semester', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 semester' GROUP BY qp.source_type ORDER BY count DESC
